Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Can You Help me find an edition of the vedic dictionary, Nirukti please ?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-11-14 · 7 answers
Can You Help me find an edition of the vedic dictionary, Nirukti please ?
i havent found not even one online the wire.

Hare Krsna !
user [179] · 2007-11-15
i had read somewhere that it is a huge book, dyou know it if exist?
user [40] · 2007-11-16
Here is some of it on google books

http://books.google.com/books?id=0l2UOabkPTIC&dq=nirukta&printsec=frontcover&source=web&ots=tEzMglJLjr&sig=NMFmKoC5VqqPL5JYK1tfHUQZpYo#PPA1,M1

and another bit of it

http://www.hindunet.org/hindu_history/sarasvati/dictionary/9niruktam.htm

Its all here but you need to download it

ftp://ia331313.us.archive.org/1/items/BharathiNirukti

Someone else might do better

You could have found these doing a google search you might find more I gave up after a while
user [38] · 2007-11-16
> You could have found these doing a google search you might find more I gave up after a while

My words. Better to learn how to search than asking others to serve you, Suryavanshi.

http://www.dandavats.com/?p=3032
http://www.lib.berkeley.edu/TeachingLib/Guides/Internet/FindInfo.html
user [40] · 2007-11-16

hare krsna, hari bol.
